items.name_en: 🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
items.name_cn:
🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
The most iconic handbag, the Le City series, returns in 2024, reinterpreting the classic. Slightly different from the classic series, the mirror and cardholder are removed, and the strap design is more suitable for crossbody wear~ Small detail changes make the overall look lighter. The newly added macaron color series is especially suitable for spring and summer, creating a stylish collision of unruly cool looks and sweet colors, making fashion accessible.
Dimensions: 37 x 23.4 x 14.9 cm
Model: 823058 Silver nail

items.name_cn:
🌹🌹🌹
🦈[MCM] mini versatile crossbody bag: The Visetos series is designed for MCM lovers, showcasing the timeless style of the classic MCM Visetos.
This crossbody bag is lightweight and convenient, making it easy to go out with just a phone and a few cards, keeping it within reach. You can also create your own personal fashion style by matching accessories or changing the crossbody strap.
Dimensions: 18.5x12x4.5cm
Removable crossbody strap
Zipper closure
Front zip pocket
External back open pocket
Metallic tone set of 5

items.name_en: 🌹🌹🌹 MCM Visetos cylindrical crossbody bag
items.name_cn:
🌹🌹🌹 MCM Visetos cylindrical crossbody bag
The geometric shape of this small crossbody bag is more refined against the classic Visetos pattern 🌹 and the gold-tone logo plate. The bag is made of 🇫🇷 French Nappa cowhide and features a double zipper closure. The fabric-lined interior offers ample space to store your valuables. This cylindrical crossbody bag can be carried by the top leather handle or by using the included crossbody strap for portability. Strap length is 98 to 114 cm
Dimensions: 16x16x14cm

items.name_en: 🌹🌹🌹 New Color-Block Kelly Bag🎉, MCM Leather Kelly Bag 👜 Featuring Visetos print coated canvas paired with exquisite cowhide, making the classic MCM style shine with dazzling brilliance. Detachable shoulder strap, iconic turnlock closure, and a compact interior design lined with faux suede fabric, all adding the finishing touches. Whether in styling, structure, or style, it exudes timeless fashion [Strong] Size: 18.5×9.5×14.5cm

items.name_en: 🌹🌹🌹MCM Kelly mini shoulder bag showcases MCM's long history and tradition. A fashionable and elegant style, with a top handle design, a front flap with a turn-lock closure, and an adjustable single-shoulder strap. A classic reproduction made of iconic Visetos print coated canvas, with gold hardware enhancing the exquisite beauty. Dimensions: 18x15x10cm

items.name_en: 🍁 Maple Leaf Color! Versatile color style 🌬🌟🌟 In Stock! CHANEL 2024 CF Sequin Bag. I fell in love with the black one at first glance. If you like it, one look is enough. The Maple Leaf🍁 color is very spring-like. Considering durability and a premium feel, I didn't hesitate to get the black one. This CF sequin bag is more eye-catching than the leather version. Practical capacity and moderate size, a style worth collecting! Size: 20cm

items.name_en: 🍒M 🍒 5BB172: Miu Miu new size briefcase, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing a sophisticated multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements, casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Oversized capacity yet lightweight, minimalist yet not simple. The new size offers better fit. Major fashion bloggers almost all have one. Size: 29X17X9cm (with original packaging)
